spec.name: The Forest Clearing
spec.description: You are in a clearing in the forest. Lots of fresh stumps of varying sizes protrude from the ground and heavy logs are stacked neatly in a big pile supported by stakes set into the ground. Paths lead north, east and west.

north.description: The small path leads north through the trees.

east.description: The small path leads east through the trees.

west.description: The small path leads west through the trees.

extra_descs.description: Even though the logs have been chopped to shorter pieces, they are quite heavy as they are fresh and still filled with sap.
The narrow path is probably used by the animals living in the forest.
The stakes keep the logs from rolling down.
There are more stumps than logs and some of the stumps are partly covered in moss.
The trees are mostly old beeches and oaks.
